Get
in touch

Whether you are enquiring about a clinical appointment, a workshop, a research collaboration, or simply want to know more about the practice, you are welcome to write.

The free 20-minute introductory call is always a good starting point if you are unsure which service might suit you best.

Enquiries welcome for
Clinical consultations — 聽 The Listening Clinic
Therapeutic bodywork — in person, Portugal
Menopause care and Vital Forms
Retreat bookings and bespoke programmes
Research workshops and CPD
Earth, Body, Cloud — teaching and collaboration
Grant partnerships and residency invitations

Send a message

Your message will be sent directly. I aim to respond within 2–3 working days.
